request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about What We Will Learn Today. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Introduction to Life Processes, Nutrition Types. Must show visually: Define 'Life Processes' clearly; Distinguish Autotrophic vs Heterotrophic nutrition; Explain why respiration is vital for energy. Visual goal: A labelled classroom diagram for What We Will Learn Today that makes the process or structure visible while the teacher explains learning-outcomes.. Teaching context: Clarify expectations and provide a roadmap for the lesson.. Student takeaway: Students know exactly what they will be able to do by the end of class.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, classroom poster, infographic, worksheet, UI card, or presentation layout...
request.negativePrompt: text, labels, captions, numbers, watermark, decorative clutter, formula text, axis labels, diagram callouts, presentation slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, poster layout, infographic layout, ui card, worksheet, powerpoint slide, presentation template
request.subject: Science (086)
